text.title: Agile and Hybrid Approaches Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Agile and Hybrid Approaches methodology end-to-end.

step.name: score-five-factors
step.action: Score each of the 5 factors P/H/A with evidence anchored to the source.

step.name: apply-threshold
step.action: Apply: 4+ P -> Predictive; 4+ A -> Agile; 2+P AND 2+A -> Hybrid; otherwise majority signal.
step.decision-gate: If the threshold says Hybrid but the team strongly prefers a pure approach, document the override reason.

step.name: partition-phases
step.action: For Hybrid, partition the project into named phases and assign one approach per phase.

step.name: define-done-per-phase
step.action: Write a distinct Definition of Done per phase; reject DoDs shared across modes.

step.name: publish-adr
step.action: Persist as ADR with named decision_owner; require ADR review in next steering committee.
step.decision-gate: Reopen ADR only on material change to a factor; do not silently revise.
